title: Gidan Idèr Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Gidan Idèr, with a Z-Score of +6.09. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Gidan Idèr is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 20.3 GG. 
 The low humidity of 24% and moderate wind speed of 12.3 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating demand, while the CDD is significantly high, leading to increased cooling demands.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
